# @webamoki/web-svelte

> A Svelte 5 component library for SvelteKit providing type-safe forms, UI components, and utilities.

- **Framework:** Svelte 5 (Runes) & SvelteKit
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS v4
- **Validation:** ArkType
- **Forms:** sveltekit-superforms

---

## Installation

```bash
pnpm add @webamoki/web-svelte
```

Peer dependencies: `svelte`, `@sveltejs/kit`, `arktype`, `sveltekit-superforms`, `tailwindcss`, `@tailwindcss/forms`, `@tailwindcss/typography`, `@internationalized/date`

---

## Exports

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/components/form`

Type-safe form components built on sveltekit-superforms and ArkType.

All field components extend `FieldWrapperProps`:

```ts
interface FieldWrapperProps<T extends Record<string, unknown>, U extends FormPath<T>, M> {
  class?: string;
  description?: string;
  form: FsSuperForm<T, M>;
  label?: string;
  name: U;
}
```

#### `Form`

Main form wrapper with server action handling.

```svelte
<Form actionName?: string actionPath: string class?: string form: FsSuperForm<T, M>>
  {children}
</Form>
```

#### `Button`

Submit button with loading state.

```svelte
<Button class?: string disabled?: boolean loading?: boolean loadingMessage?: string>
  {children}
</Button>
```

`loadingMessage` defaults to `"Please wait"`.

#### `TextField`

Text input field with optional icon.

```svelte
<TextField
  {...fieldWrapperProps}
  class?: string
  icon?: Component
  placeholder?: string
  type?: HTMLInputElement['type']
  bind:value?: string
/>
```

#### `TextFieldNullable`

Text input that supports `null` values.

```svelte
<TextFieldNullable
  {...fieldWrapperProps}
  class?: string
  icon?: Component
  placeholder?: string
  type?: HTMLInputElement['type']
  bind:value?: string | null
/>
```

#### `PasswordField`

Password input with show/hide toggle.

```svelte
<PasswordField
  {...fieldWrapperProps}
  class?: string
  icon?: Component
  bind:value?: string
/>
```

#### `NumberField`

Number input with optional step precision.

```svelte
<NumberField
  {...fieldWrapperProps}
  class?: string
  icon?: Component
  placeholder?: string
  step?: HTMLInputElement['step']
  bind:value?: number
/>
```

#### `DateField`

Date input bound to `CalendarDate` from `@internationalized/date`.

```svelte
<DateField
  {...fieldWrapperProps}
  class?: string
  icon?: Component
  bind:value?: CalendarDate
/>
```

#### `TimeField`

Time input bound to `Time` from `@internationalized/date`.

```svelte
<TimeField
  {...fieldWrapperProps}
  class?: string
  icon?: Component
  placeholder?: string
  step?: HTMLInputElement['step']
  bind:value?: Time
/>
```

#### `SelectField`

Single-select dropdown.

```svelte
<SelectField
  {...fieldWrapperProps}
  class?: string
  getKey: (item: I) => K
  getLabel: (item: I) => string
  getValue: (item: I) => V
  icon?: Component
  items: readonly I[]
  onchange?: (value: V | undefined) => void
  placeholder: string
  bind:value?: V
/>
```

#### `SelectMultiField`

Multi-select dropdown.

```svelte
<SelectMultiField
  {...fieldWrapperProps}
  class?: string
  getKey: (item: I) => K
  getLabel: (item: I) => string
  getValue: (item: I) => V
  icon?: Component
  items: readonly I[]
  onchange?: (value: V[]) => void
  placeholder: string
  bind:values?: V[]
/>
```

#### `ChoiceField`

Single-choice toggle buttons.

```svelte
<ChoiceField
  {...fieldWrapperProps}
  buttonContent?: Snippet
  disabled?: boolean
  getKey: (item: I) => K
  getLabel: (item: I) => string
  getValue: (item: I) => V
  items: readonly I[]
  onChange?: (value: V) => void
  readonly?: boolean
  bind:value?: V
  vertical?: boolean
/>
```

#### `ChoiceMultiField`

Multi-choice toggle buttons.

```svelte
<ChoiceMultiField
  {...fieldWrapperProps}
  buttonContent?: Snippet
  disabled?: boolean
  getKey: (item: I) => K
  getLabel: (item: I) => string
  getValue: (item: I) => V
  items: readonly I[]
  onAdd?: (value: V) => void
  onRemove?: (value: V) => void
  readonly?: boolean
  bind:value?: V[]
  vertical?: boolean
/>
```

#### `MessageField`

Textarea for longer text input.

```svelte
<MessageField
  {...fieldWrapperProps}
  class?: string
  defaultHeight?: number
  icon?: Component
  placeholder?: string
  resize?: boolean
  bind:value?: string
/>
```

`defaultHeight` defaults to `100`. `resize` defaults to `false`.

#### `HexColorField`

Hex color picker field.

```svelte
<HexColorField
  {...fieldWrapperProps}
  bind:value?: string
/>
```

#### `WeekdayChoiceField`

Single weekday selector.

```svelte
<WeekdayChoiceField
  {...fieldWrapperProps}
  disabled?: boolean
  letterLabels?: boolean
  longLabels?: boolean
  onChange?: (value: Day) => void
  readonly?: boolean
  bind:value?: Day
  vertical?: boolean
/>
```

#### `WeekdayChoiceMultiField`

Multi-weekday selector.

```svelte
<WeekdayChoiceMultiField
  {...fieldWrapperProps}
  disabled?: boolean
  letterLabels?: boolean
  longLabels?: boolean
  onAdd?: (value: Day) => void
  onRemove?: (value: Day) => void
  readonly?: boolean
  bind:value?: Day[]
  vertical?: boolean
/>
```

#### `IconInputWrapper`

Wrapper that adds an icon to input fields.

```svelte
<IconInputWrapper icon?: Component iconPosition?: 'center' | 'top' flex?: boolean>
  {#snippet children(attrs: { class: string })}
    <input class={attrs.class} />
  {/snippet}
</IconInputWrapper>
```

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/components/ui`

Higher-level UI components.

#### `Choice`

Standalone single-choice selector.

```svelte
<Choice
  getKey: (item: I) => K
  getLabel: (item: I) => string
  getValue: (item: I) => V
  items: readonly I[]
  buttonContent?: Snippet
  disabled?: boolean
  readonly?: boolean
  vertical?: boolean
  onChange?: (value: V) => void
  bind:value?: V
/>
```

#### `ChoiceMulti`

Standalone multi-choice selector.

```svelte
<ChoiceMulti
  getKey: (item: I) => K
  getLabel: (item: I) => string
  getValue: (item: I) => V
  items: readonly I[]
  buttonContent?: Snippet
  disabled?: boolean
  readonly?: boolean
  vertical?: boolean
  onAdd?: (value: V) => void
  onRemove?: (value: V) => void
  bind:value?: V[]
/>
```

#### `WeekdayChoice`

Single weekday selector with configurable labels.

```svelte
<WeekdayChoice
  class?: string
  disabled?: boolean
  letterLabels?: boolean
  longLabels?: boolean
  readonly?: boolean
  vertical?: boolean
  onChange?: (value: Day) => void
  bind:value?: Day
/>
```

#### `WeekdayChoiceMulti`

Multi-weekday selector with configurable labels.

```svelte
<WeekdayChoiceMulti
  class?: string
  disabled?: boolean
  letterLabels?: boolean
  longLabels?: boolean
  readonly?: boolean
  vertical?: boolean
  onAdd?: (value: Day) => void
  onRemove?: (value: Day) => void
  bind:value: Day[]
/>
```

#### `ContextMenu`

Right-click context menu.

```svelte
<ContextMenu onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void>
  <ContextMenuTrigger>
    {children}
  </ContextMenuTrigger>
  <ContextMenuContent class?: string>
    <ContextMenuItem onclick?: (e: MouseEvent) => void disabled?: boolean variant?: 'default' | 'destructive'>
      {children}
    </ContextMenuItem>
    <ContextMenuSeparator />
  </ContextMenuContent>
</ContextMenu>
```

#### `DragManager`

State manager for drag-and-drop operations.

```ts
class DragManager<T> {
  get isDragging(): boolean;
  get dragData(): T | undefined;
  drag(data: T): void;
  stop(): void;
}
```

#### `Draggable`

Makes content draggable.

```svelte
<Draggable class?: string data: T manager: DragManager<T>>
  {children}
</Draggable>
```

#### `Dropzone`

Drop target that validates and accepts dragged items.

```svelte
<Dropzone
  class?: string
  isDroppable: (data: T) => boolean
  manager: DragManager<T>
  onDrop: (data: T) => void
>
  {children}
</Dropzone>
```

#### `SearchBar`

Search input with icon and debounced change callback.

```svelte
<SearchBar
  class?: string
  defaultValue?: string
  onChange: (value: string) => void
  placeholder?: string
/>
```

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/utils/datetime`

Date/time utilities built on `@internationalized/date`.

#### Types

```ts
const Days: readonly ['Monday', 'Tuesday', 'Wednesday', 'Thursday', 'Friday', 'Saturday', 'Sunday'];
type Day = (typeof Days)[number];
const DayIndex: Record<Day, number>;
```

#### `LocalDateF`

Timezone-aware date functions.

```ts
class LocalDateF {
  constructor(timezone: string);
  today(): CalendarDate;
  now(): ZonedDateTime;
  isDateToday(date: CalendarDate): boolean;
  ageFromDob(dob: CalendarDate): number;
  dateWithin(date: CalendarDate, duration: DateDuration): boolean;
}
```

#### Date Functions

```ts
function getDayIndexOfDate(date: CalendarDate): number;
function getDayOfDate(date: CalendarDate): Day;
function isDateDay(date: CalendarDate, dayOfWeek: Day): boolean;
function checkOverlap(start1: Time, end1: Time, start2: Time, end2: Time): boolean;
function datesWithin(date1: CalendarDate, date2: CalendarDate, duration: DateDuration): boolean;
function getLastDateOfDay(dayOfWeek: Day, startDate: CalendarDate): CalendarDate;
function getLastDatesOfDay(dayOfWeek: Day, count: number, startDate: CalendarDate): CalendarDate[];
function getLastMonths(count: number, startDate: CalendarDate): CalendarDate[];
function getNextDateOfDay(dayOfWeek: Day, startDate: CalendarDate): CalendarDate;
function dateDiffWeeks(date1: CalendarDate, date2: CalendarDate): number;
```

#### Formatting

```ts
function formatDayLetter(day: Day): string;        // "Monday" -> "M"
function formatDayShort(day: Day): string;          // "Monday" -> "Mon"
function formatDateFull(date: CalendarDate): string; // "5 Oct 2023"
function formatDateISO(date: CalendarDate): string;  // "2023-10-05"
function formatDateNum(date: CalendarDate): string;  // "05/10/2023"
function formatDateShort(date: CalendarDate): string; // "Oct 5"
function formatMonth(date: CalendarDate): string;    // "Oct 23"
function formatAbsolute(datetime: ZonedDateTime): string; // "05/10/2023 14:30:00"
function formatTime(time: Time): string;             // "14:30"
function formatTimeEnd(timeStart: Time, durationMinutes: number): string;
function formatTimeFull(time: Time): string;         // "14:30:00"
```

#### State Handling

```ts
function unfreezeDate(raw: ReturnType<typeof $state.snapshot<CalendarDate>>): CalendarDate;
function unfreezeTime(raw: ReturnType<typeof $state.snapshot<Time>>): Time;
function unfreezeAbsoluteDate(raw: ReturnType<typeof $state.snapshot<ZonedDateTime>>): ZonedDateTime;
```

#### Transport

```ts
const dateTransport: Transport;
```

SvelteKit `Transport` for `CalendarDate`, `Time`, and `ZonedDateTime` serialization/deserialization.

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/utils/arktype`

Common ArkType validators.

```ts
const IntegerId: Type<number>;   // number.integer >= 0
const Phone: Type<string>;       // allows "+", digits, and spaces
const HexColor: Type<string>;    // 3 or 6 hex digit color (without #)
const Day: Type<Day>;            // enum of weekday names
const Time: Type<Time>;          // instanceof @internationalized/date Time
const CalendarDate: Type<CalendarDate>; // instanceof @internationalized/date CalendarDate

function trimTo(typeTo: Type<string>): Type<string>;
```

`trimTo` creates a type that trims whitespace before applying the inner validation.

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/utils/form`

Form initialization utilities for sveltekit-superforms.

#### `prepareForm`

Initializes a superform with an ArkType schema and pre-validated data.

```ts
function prepareForm<S extends type.Any<Record<string, unknown>>>(
  schema: S,
  validated: S['infer'] | SuperValidated<S['infer']>,
  options?: {
    invalidateAll?: boolean;
    onError?: (form: SuperValidated<S['infer'], App.Superforms.Message>) => void;
    onSuccess?: (form: SuperValidated<S['infer'], App.Superforms.Message>) => void;
    onUpdated?: (form: SuperValidated<S['infer'], App.Superforms.Message>) => void;
    resetForm?: boolean;
  }
): { data: Writable<S['infer']>; errors: Writable<...>; form: SuperForm; isProcessing: Readable<boolean> };
```

#### `prepareEmptyForm`

Initializes a superform with defaults (no initial data needed).

```ts
function prepareEmptyForm<S extends type.Any<Record<string, unknown>>>(
  schema: S,
  options?: {
    invalidateAll?: boolean;
    onError?: (form: SuperValidated<S['infer'], App.Superforms.Message>) => void;
    onSuccess?: (form: SuperValidated<S['infer'], App.Superforms.Message>) => void;
    onUpdated?: (form: SuperValidated<S['infer'], App.Superforms.Message>) => void;
    resetForm?: boolean;
  }
): { data: Writable<S['infer']>; errors: Writable<...>; form: SuperForm; isProcessing: Readable<boolean> };
```

#### `VirtualForm`

Client-side form submission without a `<form>` element. Useful for programmatic submissions.

```ts
class VirtualForm<S extends type.Any<Record<string, unknown>>> {
  constructor(
    schema: S,
    action: string,
    options?: {
      actionName?: string;
      onError?: (message: App.Superforms.Message) => void;
      onSuccess?: (form: SuperValidated<S['infer'], App.Superforms.Message>) => void;
      transport?: Transport;
    }
  );
  get isProcessing(): boolean;
  submit(data: S['infer']): Promise<void>;
}
```

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/utils/email`

AWS SES email sending via Web Crypto API (Cloudflare Workers compatible).

```ts
interface SendEmailOptions {
  awsAccessKeyId: string;
  awsRegion: string;
  awsSecretAccessKey: string;
  from: string;
  fromName?: string;
  to: string | string[];
  cc?: string | string[];
  bcc?: string | string[];
  replyTo?: string | string[];
  subject: string;
  text?: string;
  html?: string;
}

function sendEmail(options: SendEmailOptions): Promise<string>;
```

Returns the SES `MessageId` on success.

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/utils/functional`

Functional programming utilities.

#### `Result`

A discriminated union type for error handling without exceptions.

```ts
type Result<T, E> = { ok: true; value: T } | { ok: false; error: E };

const Result = {
  ok<T>(value: T): { ok: true; value: T };
  err<E>(error: E): { ok: false; error: E };
  isOk<T, E>(result: Result<T, E>): result is { ok: true; value: T };
  isErr<T, E>(result: Result<T, E>): result is { ok: false; error: E };
  unwrapOr<T, E>(result: Result<T, E>, defaultValue: T): T;
  unwrapOrElse<T, E>(result: Result<T, E>, op: (error: E) => T): T;
  map<T, U, E>(result: Result<T, E>, fn: (val: T) => U): Result<U, E>;
  mapErr<T, E, F>(result: Result<T, E>, fn: (err: E) => F): Result<T, F>;
  andThen<T, U, E>(result: Result<T, E>, op: (val: T) => Result<U, E>): Result<U, E>;
  orElse<T, E, F>(result: Result<T, E>, op: (err: E) => Result<T, F>): Result<T, F>;
  match<T, E, R>(result: Result<T, E>, arms: { ok: (val: T) => R; err: (err: E) => R }): R;
};
```

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/server/form-handler`

Server-side form handling helpers for `+page.server.ts` actions.

```ts
function errorMessage<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(
  form: SuperValidated<T>,
  options?: { data?: unknown; showToast?: boolean; text?: string }
): ActionResult;

function successMessage<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(
  form: SuperValidated<T>,
  options?: { data?: unknown; showToast?: boolean; text?: string }
): ActionResult;

function failFormValidation<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(
  form: SuperValidated<T>
): ActionFailure<{ form: SuperValidated<T> }>;

function handleDbErrorForm<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(
  form: SuperValidated<T>,
  message: string,
  err: unknown
): ActionFailure<{ form: SuperValidated<T> }>;

function isDuplicateDbError(err: unknown): boolean;
```

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/server/form-processor`

Server-side form validation.

```ts
function processForm<S extends type.Any<Record<string, unknown>>>(
  request: Request,
  schema: S
): Promise<SuperValidated<S['infer']>>;
```

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/utils/remote`

SvelteKit remote function helpers with guard patterns.

#### Types

```ts
type ResponseError = { code: number; message: string };
type ResponseResult<T> = Result<T, ResponseError>;
type CheckFunction = () => Promise<Result<void, ResponseError>>;

const CheckResult = {
  ok(): { ok: true; value: void };
};

const ResponseResult = {
  unwrap<T>(result: ResponseResult<T>): T; // throws SvelteKit error on failure
};
```

#### Guarded Remote Functions

Wrap SvelteKit `command`, `query`, and `form` remote functions with authorization checks.

Note that the function bodies for `command` remote functions cannot throw SvelteKit errors or redirect. `query` and `form` remote functions can.

All guarded functions run the `CheckFunction` before the handler. On check failure, `guardedCommand` and `guardedCommandVoid` return a `Result.err`; all others throw a SvelteKit error via `ResponseResult.unwrap`.

```ts
function guardedCommand<Schema extends StandardSchemaV1, Output>(
  check: CheckFunction,
  schema: Schema,
  fn: (output: InferOutput<Schema>) => Promise<ResponseResult<Output>>
): RemoteCommand<InferInput<Schema>, Promise<ResponseResult<Output>>>;

function guardedCommandVoid<Output>(
  check: CheckFunction,
  fn: () => Promise<ResponseResult<Output>>
): RemoteCommand<void, Promise<ResponseResult<Output>>>;

function guardedForm<Schema extends StandardSchemaV1, Output>(
  schema: Schema,
  check: CheckFunction,
  fn: (output: InferOutput<Schema>, issue: InvalidField<InferInput<Schema>>) => Promise<Output>
): RemoteForm<InferInput<Schema>, Output>;

function guardedFormVoid<Output>(
  check: CheckFunction,
  fn: () => Promise<Output>
): RemoteForm<void, Output>;

function guardedQuery<Schema extends StandardSchemaV1, Output>(
  check: CheckFunction,
  schema: Schema,
  fn: (output: InferOutput<Schema>) => Promise<Output>
): RemoteQueryFunction<InferInput<Schema>, Output>;

function guardedQueryVoid<Output>(
  check: CheckFunction,
  fn: () => Promise<Output>
): RemoteQueryFunction<void, Output>;
```

---

## Usage Example

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { Form, Button, TextField, NumberField } from '@webamoki/web-svelte/components/form';
  import { prepareForm } from '@webamoki/web-svelte/utils/form';
  import { type } from 'arktype';

  const Schema = type({
    name: 'string >= 1',
    age: 'number.integer >= 0'
  });

  let { data } = $props();
  const { form, data: formData, isProcessing } = prepareForm(Schema, data.form);
</script>

<Form {form} actionPath="/api/submit">
  <TextField {form} name="name" label="Name" placeholder="Enter name" />
  <NumberField {form} name="age" label="Age" placeholder="Enter age" />
  <Button loading={$isProcessing}>Submit</Button>
</Form>
```
